title: Change of His Majesty’s Ambassador to Guinea: Daniel Shepherd
body: "Mr Daniel Shepherd has been appointed His Majesty’s Ambassador to the Republic of Guinea in succession to Mr John Marshall who will be transferring to another Diplomatic Service appointment. Mr Shepherd will take up his appointment during April 2025.  Curriculum Vitae           Full name: Daniel James Owen Shepherd     Year Role     2020 to 2024  Kingston, Deputy High Commissioner   2020  FCO, Various COVID-19 repatriation roles   2016 to 2019   Pretoria, Consular Regional Director for Sub Saharan Africa   2013 to 2015   FCO, Deputy Head, Counter Proliferation Department   2011 to 2012  UK Mission to the UN, New York, Spokesperson and Head of Communications   2008 to 2010  UK Mission to the UN, New York, First Secretary   2004 to 2008   New Delhi, First Secretary Economic/Trade Policy/Climate Change   2003 to 2004  FCO, Head of Strategic Planning Unit, Financial Planning and Performance Department   2001 to 2003  FCO, Head of Political Section, United Nations Department   2000  UK Mission to the UN, New York, Conference Support Officer   1996 to 2000   Hanoi, Third later Second Secretary and Head of Political Section   1995 to 1996  FCO, Pre-posting training, including Vietnamese language training   1994 to 1995  FCO, Transcaucasus desk officer, Eastern Department.   1994   Joined FCO      Media enquiries     Email newsdesk@fcdo.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7008 3100    Email the FCDO Newsdesk (monitored 24 hours a day) in the first instance, and we will respond as soon as possible.   "
